products.body_html:
What is Microdermabrasion?

Microdermabrasion is a non-invasive skin care procedure that uses microcrystals or a diamond head to exfoliate the outer layer of the skin. This process helps remove dead skin cells, stimulate collagen production, and improve skin texture and tone.

Using the TopDirect Microdermabrasion Machine

  • Deep Exfoliation: This machine uses a diamond head to gently yet effectively exfoliate the skin, removing dead skin cells and impurities from the skin's surface.
  • Powerful Suction (65-68cmHg): The machine offers powerful suction that helps extract impurities, blackheads, and excess sebum from pores, leaving the skin clean and refreshed.
  • Collagen Stimulation: By exfoliating the skin, the machine stimulates collagen production, which can help reduce the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines, and improve skin elasticity.
  • Improvement of Skin Texture and Tone: Regular use of the machine can help even out skin tone, reduce pigmentation spots, and smooth acne scars.
  • Versatile Use: Designed for home use, this device offers a practical and economical alternative to salon treatments while providing comparable results.

WHAT is a Dry Heat Sterilizer?
Dry heat hot air sterilizer generally involves placing an item to be sterilized inside an oven or heat chamber, and heating it until it is warmed all the way through. This process usually kills infectious organisms. It is suitable for use by Home Users & in beauty salons and spas but is also great for nail technicians, mobile therapists & students. This item could heat up to 220-celsius degrees. The first advantage of using it is metal tools and instruments will not rust, allowing these tools and instruments to last much longer. Other advantages include less pitting and dulling of sharps, and no drying time is required.
